CREATE TABLE numbers (a INT, b INT);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (2, 3);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (0, 5);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (-1, 4);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (1000000, 1000000);
SELECT a * b FROM numbers;
SELECT (a * b) + 1 AS result FROM numbers;
SELECT a * (b + 1) AS adjusted_result FROM numbers;
SELECT (SELECT a FROM numbers WHERE b = 3) * (SELECT b FROM numbers WHERE a = 2) AS product;
CREATE TABLE more_numbers (c INT, d INT);
INSERT INTO more_numbers VALUES (3, 4);
INSERT INTO more_numbers VALUES (5, 1);
SELECT n.a, n.b, m.c, m.d, n.a * m.c AS multiplication FROM numbers n JOIN more_numbers m ON n.b = m.d;
WITH temp AS (SELECT a, b FROM numbers) SELECT a * (SELECT SUM(b) FROM temp) AS total_product FROM temp;
SELECT a * b * (SELECT SUM(b) FROM numbers) AS final_product FROM numbers;
SELECT A.total, B.multiplier, A.total * B.multiplier AS multiplied_value FROM (SELECT SUM(a * b) AS total FROM numbers) AS A, (SELECT 2 AS multiplier) AS B;
CREATE TABLE another_numbers (x FLOAT, y FLOAT);
INSERT INTO another_numbers VALUES (1.5, 2.0), (3.0, 4.0), (5.0, -2.0);
SELECT x, y, x * y AS product FROM another_numbers;
SELECT x * y * (SELECT AVG(y) FROM another_numbers) AS scaled_product FROM another_numbers;
